decisions.rationale: Standard SACCO policy: accrued interest first, then outstanding penalties, then principal

decisions.decision: Batch job auto-applies via PenaltyRule config
decisions.rationale: Reads active LOAN_DEFAULT PenaltyRule, calculates FLAT or PERCENTAGE amount, calls applyPenalty()

decisions.decision: Configurable per PenaltyRule via compounding boolean
decisions.rationale: Flexible: one-time or monthly compounding per rule

decisions.decision: Add paid/paidAt to LoanPenalty, totalPenalties to LoanApplication, scheduleId to LoanPenalty
decisions.rationale: Required for repayment allocation and idempotent penalty application

constraints: Must not break existing interest-first repayment allocation
PenaltyRule in sacco-config, batch in sacco-loan - bridge via ConfigService
Penalty GL entries already handled by FinancialEventListener
Liquibase migrations required for new/modified columns
